headline: Prologis Sets Record as Data Center Growth Boosts Results
summary: Prologis’ Q2 results highlighted robust industrial leasing and aggressive data center growth, as the REIT eyes a $16.6B Segro acquisition.

headline: Prologis Targets Spec Builds as Industrial Leasing Surges
summary: Prologis eyes spec construction in 24+ US markets as leasing and tenant demand rise amid federal manufacturing incentives.

headline: Disinflation Meets Escalation
summary: U.S. stocks slip as Middle East tensions lift oil, while cooler CPI/PPI ease July Fed hike fears.
